lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me the basics of Woodcutting and Firemaking, please?

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: I'd give you an axe to chop trees with but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have an axe so that you can chop the trees around me.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: When you see a likely looking tree, appreciate its beauty, then simply click on it to chop it down.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: When you have a full inventory of logs, you have a choice. You can take it to the bank, there's one on the roof of the castle in Lumbridge, or you can burn them.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Ah, you've lost your tinderbox have you? Have another!

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Click on your tinderbox, then click on one of the logs in your inventory, this will attempt to light a fire that you can use for cooking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that cape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: This is a Skillcape of Woodcutting, wearing one increases your chance of finding bird's nests. Only a person who has achieved the highest possible level in a skill can wear one.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: I'd give you an axe to chop trees with but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have an axe so that you can chop the trees around me.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Choose carefully where and what you chop, you can get different trees in different places throughout the land.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Make sure you hang on to your logs, don't throw them away as you can get valuable firemaking experience from them! Look out for other things too...

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Watch out for the tree spirits, they really don't like you chopping trees, they can really do some damage if you're not paying attention...

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Don't forget you can always use logs for fletching experience too.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Yes, you'll need lots of logs if you want to be a good fletcher. Talk to the ranging tutor for more information.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: I'd give you an axe to chop trees with but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have an axe so that you can chop the trees around me.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: As you get better and better you'll find that you can chop trees such as Maple and Yew! These are very good for firemaking.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Of course, they're also very useful for fletching.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Also, look out for birds' nests, you never know what our feathered friends have been collecting. Jewellery and Clue scrolls maybe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about different trees and axes.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Hollow trees can be found in the Haunted Woods east of Canifis, but be careful of the leeches.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: As you progress in your combat skill you will find you can wield your woodcutting axe as a weapon, it's not very effective, but it frees up a slot for another log.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that cape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: This is a Skillcape of Woodcutting, wearing one increases your chance of finding bird's nests. Only a person who has achieved the highest possible level in a skill can wear one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Wow! It's not often I meet somebody as accomplished as you in Woodcutting! Perhaps you should become the tutor, instead of me! Seeing as you're so skilled, maybe you are interested in buying a Skillcape of

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Woodcutting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Ok, come back to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: I can't sell you one here. Try talking to me later.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Anybody who has spent as much time cutting trees as you deserves the right to own one. Wearing this cape will increase your chance of finding bird's nests. That'll be 99000 coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 99000! That's too rich for me.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Well go chop down a few mahogany trees and sell the timber; then you'll be able to afford one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Well come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Woodsman tutor
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!
